summary: Created the downstream M7 UI/localization/visual quality-track task graph from the product-owner directive, accepted visual/UX handoff, systems review, QA review, and Beta culture-review evidence. The plan keeps implementation blocked behind this REVIEW task, preserves the save-migration ready path, and makes UI/localization exit a prerequisite for formal content lock acceptance and M7 exit validation.

tests_run.result: Showed modified allowed process/task files, nine new M7 UI/localization task JSON files, and lead/status-check route evidence. No apps, packages, content-source, docs, PROJECT_STATUS, tools, .github, or forbidden gate/status artifacts were modified by this writer.

tests_run.command: node .agents/skills/monsoon-studio-orchestrator/scripts/taskctl.mjs validate M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001; validate M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001; validate M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001; validate M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001; validate M7-MAP-PRESENTATION-QUALITY-001; validate M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001; validate M7-APPOINTMENT-FLOW-QUALITY-001; validate M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001; validate M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001; validate M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001; validate M7-PLATFORM-RESOLUTION-LOCALIZATION-MATRIX-001; validate M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001; validate M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001
tests_run.result: All 13 created or updated task files returned VALID.
Listed M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001 as REVIEW; newly created UI/localization downstream tasks are DRAFT; previously closed M7 prerequisite evidence remains CLOSED.
Only M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 is ready, preserving the existing save-migration ready state and preventing new UI tasks from bypassing planning review.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001 plus created/updated downstream and gate task files

decisions.decision: Created explicit downstream task JSON for i18n foundation, design tokens/asset slots, app shell quality, map presentation quality, district inspector quality, appointment flow quality, player guidance lite, UI regression matrix, and UI/localization exit validation.

All new implementation tasks depend directly or indirectly on M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001, so they cannot become dependency-ready until this planning task passes review and is closed by lead integration.

M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 and M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 precede M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001; app shell precedes map, inspector, appointment, and guidance surfaces; UI regression follows those surfaces.
M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 is now a prerequisite of M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 and M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001, preventing M7 content lock or exit from passing while this quality track is unfinished.
M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 was not modified and remains the only taskctl-ready M7 task; the UI/localization track does not block save migration without an explicit dependency reason.

Each new downstream task inherits i18n outside sim-core, no UI ownership of authoritative WorldState, Pixi render-cache-only, GameCommand/query/read-model boundaries, player/debug separation, full Human Gate list, DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE, and no server/multiplayer/telemetry/cloud-save implementation/release/commercial/production-art scope.
The zh-CN versus zh-Hans locale-code drift is explicitly assigned to M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 for systems-reviewed resolution before downstream localized UI polish depends on locale identifiers.

risks.summary: Downstream implementers could over-read visual target expressions as authorization for new simulation, protocol, or product systems.
risks.mitigation: Each task states that work must use existing read models, command previews, tokens, slots, layout, and localization; new domain capability requires separate approved task and systems review.

risks.summary: UI icons, portraits, map symbols, naming, scripts, flags, religious imagery, and cultural motifs can imply unsupported historical claims.
risks.mitigation: Tasks require neutral placeholders and route culture-specific production choices to historical/cultural review or Human Gate.

risks.summary: Product-owner directive names zh-CN while prior M7 coverage uses zh-Hans for Simplified Chinese.
risks.mitigation: M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 must resolve or alias locale identifiers with tests before other UI tasks rely on them.

risks.summary: git status shows lead/status-check route and state file updates while this writer was completing the handoff.
risks.mitigation: Those files are allowed process evidence and are not required for the task graph decisions; lead/QA should include or reconcile them during integration without reverting unrelated process updates.

requested_action: Independent QA review of the M7 UI/localization/visual quality-track plan, dependency graph, Human Gate inheritance, save-migration readiness preservation, and handoff evidence.
